description: Replicates a bug where the TypeString for a slice of a same-package struct was not fully qualified.

assertions.description: The 'Ranges' field on 'ItemDto' must have a fully qualified TypeString.
The PackagePath for the 'Ranges' field must be the canonical 'dto' package path.
The 'Charge' field on the slice element 'RangeItem' must have the correct external PackagePath.
